rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase does not borrow, withhold, or divert any special fund from its purpose. Art. VIII §7 governs legislative diversion of dedicated funds, not exemption levels.
quote: The Legislature shall not have power to borrow, or in any manner divert from its purpose, any special fund that may, or ought to, come into the Treasury
_note: No direct conflict; indirect fiscal impact on special funds is not addressed by this provision.
